core_arc: Child goes somewhere new and discovers something exciting along the way.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.LOCATION: Setting — the woods, the hills, the beach
personalisation_slots.INTEREST: Used to flavour what they discover
personalisation_slots.DISCOVERY: What they find — derived from interest

scenes.outline: [NAME] woke up. It was a [WEATHER] day. 'I want to go on an adventure,' said [NAME].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] looking out of a window at a bright day, excited expression. Establish character appearance.

scenes.outline: [NAME] put on a coat and went outside. [FRIEND] was there. 'Can I come too?' said [FRIEND].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] outside their home, [FRIEND] approaching. Both characters visible, friendly interaction.

scenes.outline: 'Yes!' said [NAME]. They walked to [LOCATION]. The path was long but they did not stop.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] walking along a path toward [LOCATION]. Determined expressions.

scenes.outline: At [LOCATION], [NAME] saw something. 'Look!' said [NAME]. It was a [DISCOVERY].
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] pointing at [DISCOVERY] with [FRIEND] looking on. Wonder on their faces.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went closer. 'Wow,' said [FRIEND]. 'This is amazing.' They looked at it for a long time.
scenes.illustration_brief: Close-up of [NAME] and [FRIEND] examining [DISCOVERY]. Amazed expressions.

scenes.outline: The sun began to set. 'We should go back,' said [NAME]. [FRIEND] nodded.
scenes.illustration_brief: Sunset scene at [LOCATION]. [NAME] and [FRIEND] looking at the sky, peaceful mood.

scenes.outline: They walked home. [NAME] said, 'That was the best adventure.' [FRIEND] agreed.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and [FRIEND] walking home together as the sun sets behind them.

scenes.outline: [NAME] went to bed happy. Tomorrow there would be more adventures to have.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] in bed, smiling, looking peaceful. A window shows the night sky.

comprehension_questions.retrieval: Where did [NAME] and [FRIEND] go on their adventure?
comprehension_questions.inference: How do you think [NAME] felt when they found the [DISCOVERY]?
comprehension_questions.prediction: What adventure do you think [NAME] will go on next?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: a, d, v. Copy the word: adventure.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: adventure, walked, discovered. Write a sentence about [NAME].
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about the adventure. Use the word 'discovered' in a sentence.

dinosaurs.flavour_detail: The fossil was stuck in the rock.

unicorns.flavour_detail: The crystals shone in the light.

football.flavour_detail: The grass was soft and green.

animals.flavour_detail: The cubs were soft and small.

baking.flavour_detail: The berries were ripe and red.

nature.flavour_detail: The water fell from high up.

vehicles.flavour_detail: The track went into a tunnel.

music.flavour_detail: The birds sang a pretty song.

art.flavour_detail: Someone had painted the rocks long ago.
